message:
Fix missing write_result calls in process_single_repo_worker

Bug fix:
- Add write_result for 'current' status in worker function
- Add write_result for 'diverged' status in worker function

Without these calls, repos with current/diverged status were not being
recorded in RESULTS_FILE, causing incomplete JSON output.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1486,11 +1486,13 @@ process_single_repo_worker() {
         fi
 
         if [[ "$status" == "current" ]]; then
+            write_result "$repo_name" "pull" "current" "0" "" "$local_path"
             echo "OK:current:$repo_name"
             return 0
         fi
 
         if [[ "$status" == "diverged" ]]; then
+            write_result "$repo_name" "pull" "diverged" "0" "" "$local_path"
             echo "CONFLICT:diverged:$repo_name"
             return 0
         fi
